title: WATCH:  David Muir shares story of Punch, the monkey who found comfort in a toy orangutan
fullText: David Muir shares story of Punch, the monkey who found comfort in a toy orangutanFans are lining up at Japan's Ichikawa Zoo to see the seven-month-old macaque monkey who attached himself to a stuffed orangutan after being abandoned at birth, and is now bonding with others.February 25, 2026
summary: Fans are lining up at Japan's Ichikawa Zoo to see the seven-month-old macaque monkey who attached himself to a stuffed orangutan after being abandoned at birth, and is now bonding with others.
